Author: Vlad S
Title: Issue to use GitHub Copilot
Text:
i build a project in laravel with vuejs , i tried to add github Copilot in the PhpStorm , but after i download the copilot and try to login in github , i cant and get this error in phpstorm , any ideea how i can solve it :

Allowed GitHub Copilot in GitHub account profile. Restarted the IDE multiple times after the plugin installation. I have license for Github Copilot.
